summary_sections.title: Lesson Overview
summary_sections.content_html:
Overview

This lesson covers the fundamental measures of center used to analyze and summarize data sets. You'll learn how to calculate and apply the mean, median, and mode, and understand when each is most appropriate.

summary_sections.title: Real-World Applications
summary_sections.content_html:
Real-World Applications

Example: Noble gases are examples of:

Core Definitions Monatomic Gas : A gas made of single atoms (e.g., noble gases: He, Ne, Ar, Kr, Xe, Rn). Noble Gases — Monatomic; full outer shells make them stable and unreactive. The other options — 'Ionic gases', 'Triatomic gases', and 'Diatomic gases' — are related concepts but do not correctly answer this specific question.
